race.comment: Open race to close proceedings. Looking to those resuming for the winner. DAISYDOO (12) returns and finds a nice race down in the weights, getting in at 53 kg with the claim. Boasts a strong fresh record and the form around her last time in reads favourably. No public trial to assess but the inside draw should see her land cosy. Bold showing anticipated. VINTAGE STAR (10) is a 3x winner first-up and has jumped out well in readiness. Also gets in at featherweight with the claim, though will need a smart steer from the tricky draw. BRISTLER (6) is a speedy gelding resuming that always puts himself in the race. Carries 53 kg after the claim and will prove tough to run down if left alone. The 3YO filly LA ROUX (14) returns and is unbeaten fresh and has peaks that measure up. Was a jumpout winner in readiness and can play a major role. SHINING SMILE (2) is fit and can launch late if the pace is strong, while ZANTHRON (7) will likely push forward with BRISTLER and give a sight.
